positive: A retro-futuristic design featuring a stylized astronaut floating past Saturn's rings. The style is reminiscent of 1980s synthwave posters, using neon pinks, electric blues, and deep purples. Vector art, geometric shapes, vaporwave aesthetic, clean edges.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic photography, messy lines, grunge, dirt
